title: Mise albums worker output
description: A proposed album layout (Mnemosyne or the internal baseline). Mirrors what app/albums.save_draft persists and what the deterministic validator (validate_core) checks: every placement is an eligible photo of the gallery, placed exactly once, no slot collisions. The validator is authoritative — a proposal that violates it is rejected, never stored.

asset_id.description: Must be a photo+ready asset of THIS gallery.

slot.description: Position within the spread, 0-based; unique per (spread, slot).
